洪荒设定纷繁复杂，流派众多，本书大致时间线不会偏移，部分细节设定可能会稍许不同，尽可能做到逻辑自洽。
写书不易，希望各位多多支持吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1626785160,"group_id":"6986109509361994765","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个作者写的小说太好看啦！不追不行！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxEhoLoh9MSXHeq2q1yvUyx1+lobyu0IY4dBl372vR0c","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fbb3b4134c094d4592452a8311693511~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710340&x-signature=k38Q%2FqDNTrGVqTARF14q8rbUTkM%3D","user_id":"1178279467024759","user_name":"梦里江山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1178279467024759","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_4","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.4","title_id":"author_level_4"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.4","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.4"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6986109509361994765","book_info":{"abstract":"陈玄穿越洪荒，沉睡无数年，开局签到鸿蒙大道修为却不自知。
无数生灵聚在他身边参悟大道，自称弟子。
一心只想苟回现代世界的陈玄，却被下山的弟子曝光了。
此后，洪荒遍地流传着他的传说。
通天一剑破封神：“吾可剑斩魔神，但毕生所学，不过老师的皮毛罢了。”
后土：“老师之下，圣人也是蝼蚁。”
鸿钧大怒：“瑶池，你去看看陈玄是何方神圣？”
数年，瑶池归来：“道祖，我已拜入他的门下！”
鸿钧一口老血喷出！猝！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/f1bf4bec7c4a7872d05366fb74df208b","author":"梦里江山","author_id":"","book_id":"6986109509361994765","book_name":"开局洪荒天花板，弟子虐哭了众圣","book_short_name":"洪荒，沉睡无数年，我被弟子曝光","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6986110011193852446","read_count":"34245","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1208531"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"607","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,开局,东方玄幻,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a9b423c6d64ba044bbbf6191a296062d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779305654&x-signature=l4OWV1OQxPAcNTbtPX7ABTYAC%2FY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"
